positive: A whimsical forest scene illustration featuring cute woodland animals (foxes, rabbits) interacting with glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. Style should be soft watercolor and digital painting, highly detailed, vibrant but pastel color palette, perfect for a sticker design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, harsh lines
